revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-690

Heterodyne reception

Reception in which an audio frequency is derived by beating the signal frequency with that produced by a local oscillator, followed by detection.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Beat reception}}
